purpose: Email sequence blueprints converted from CF automation logic

sequences.name: Pickup Reservation Confirmation
sequences.trigger: pickup form submitted → Apps Script → email fired
sequences.subject: Brewing Brothers — Pickup Reserved ✅
sequences.body_summary: Thanks [name], your pickup reservation received. We'll confirm timing within 24h.
sequences.cf_equivalent: Immediate confirmation email in CF funnel flow

sequences.name: Pickup 24h Follow-Up
sequences.subject: Confirming your Brewing Brothers pickup 🍊
sequences.body_summary: Here's your confirmed pickup window. See you at Orangevale!

sequences.name: Order Shipped Confirmation
sequences.status: Phase 2 M7/M8 — wired via webhook stub
sequences.subject: Your Brewing Brothers order is confirmed 🧃
sequences.body_summary: Order confirmed. Shipping soon. Track link: [link].

sequences.name: Post-Purchase Review Request
sequences.subject: How's the juice? We'd love your feedback 🌱

sequences.name: Win-Back / Repeat Purchase
sequences.trigger: 21 days after last purchase, no new order
sequences.subject: Fresh batch dropping soon 🧃
sequences.body_summary: New batch notification + discount for repeat buyers.

sequences.name: Email Capture Lead Magnet
sequences.subject: Here's your 10% off code 🎉
sequences.body_summary: Lead magnet delivery + soft pitch to reserve pickup.
